title: Teen breaks African fishing record
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Owen Lineker (15), a...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Owen Lineker (15), a skilled young angler from Plettenberg Bay, has reeled in a phenomenal achievement, smashing both the South African and All-Africa junior records recently with a hefty 5.9kg red Chrysoblephus gibbiceps, popularly known as a red stumpnose.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Owen Lineker (15), a skilled young angler from Plettenberg Bay, has reeled in a phenomenal achievement, smashing both the South African and All-Africa junior records recently with a hefty 5.9kg red Chrysoblephus gibbiceps, popularly known as a red stumpnose."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Red stumpnoses are instantly recognisable by their reddish-pink colouring, robust bodies and distinctive short snouts; the feature that gives the species its name."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Found around rocky reefs, they are prized by anglers for their fighting spirit and rarity as a top recreational catch.","html":"Found around rocky reefs, they are prized by anglers for their fighting spirit and rarity as a top recreational catch."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Angling historyOwen's record-breaking fish was caught during the Junior Bottom Fish Nationals U16 held earlier this year. His catch surpassed the previous record of 4.9kg by a full kilogram; a monumental leap that cemented his name in South African angling history.","html":"Angling history
Owen's record-breaking fish was caught during the Junior Bottom Fish Nationals U16 held earlier this year. His catch surpassed the previous record of 4.9kg by a full kilogram; a monumental leap that cemented his name in South African angling history."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Having practised the sport since pre-school, Owen has spent years perfecting his technique - and it paid off in spectacular fashion.","html":"Having practised the sport since pre-school, Owen has spent years perfecting his technique - and it paid off in spectacular fashion."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The tournament featured 18 participants across six regional teams which included Eastern Province A,","html":"The tournament featured 18 participants across six regional teams which included Eastern Province A,"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Southern Cape, Border/WP Barbarians, Zululand, Eastern Province B, and EP/Free State Barbarians; each with three anglers per team.","html":"Southern Cape, Border/WP Barbarians, Zululand, Eastern Province B, and EP/Free State Barbarians; each with three anglers per team."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Owen's record fish was caught on a reef off the Gqeberha coast, located with the help of seasoned skipper Warren Rauchman."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"It was some of the best fishing I've ever had,\" Owen recalls.","html":"\"It was some of the best fishing I've ever had,\" Owen recalls."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"The bite was strong throughout the three-day event, even though the water turned murky on the final day.\"","html":"\"The bite was strong throughout the three-day event, even though the water turned murky on the final day.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Feisty battleFishing from a boat anchored with a grapnel in 40 metres of water, Owen used a frozen squid head as bait, presented simply to blend naturally with the reef. The red stumpnose struck hard, sparking a feisty 10-minute battle.","html":"Feisty battle
Fishing from a boat anchored with a grapnel in 40 metres of water, Owen used a frozen squid head as bait, presented simply to blend naturally with the reef. The red stumpnose struck hard, sparking a feisty 10-minute battle."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"From the moment it hit, I knew it was a big boy, but I was still shocked when I saw just how big!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"I just kept the line tight to stop it from diving back into the reef and in the end a trident 6/0 circle hook, with a bright skirt and beads rigged on a standard two-hook bottom rig, sealed the deal. It was a tough fight for sure, but I stayed focused and just trusted my reeling process.\"","html":"I just kept the line tight to stop it from diving back into the reef and in the end a trident 6/0 circle hook, with a bright skirt and beads rigged on a standard two-hook bottom rig, sealed the deal. It was a tough fight for sure, but I stayed focused and just trusted my reeling process.\""},{"type":"blockquote","text":"His set-up included an eight-foot Kingfisher rod, a seven-inch KP reel, and 20kg braid mainline paired with a 20-metre and three-metre monofilament leader."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Braid is ideal for deep water because it doesn't stretch and cuts through the current, while the mono creates a weak spot, giving the fish a fair chance of fighting,\" he explains.","html":"\"Braid is ideal for deep water because it doesn't stretch and cuts through the current, while the mono creates a weak spot, giving the fish a fair chance of fighting,\" he explains."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"VerificationThe experienced Owen, who regularly catches and releases red stumpnose, was confident in immediately identifying the species. The fish was weighed on a calibrated scale at the local fishing club and later verified as both a national and All-Africa record, a process that took nearly five months to complete.","html":"Verification
The experienced Owen, who regularly catches and releases red stumpnose, was confident in immediately identifying the species. The fish was weighed on a calibrated scale at the local fishing club and later verified as both a national and All-Africa record, a process that took nearly five months to complete."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Unfortunately, the fish could not be released, as official weighing was required for record verification."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Owen offered a simple tip to young anglers targeting reef species: \"Use small hooks\".","html":"Owen offered a simple tip to young anglers targeting reef species: \"Use small hooks\"."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With an African record already to his name, Owen now has his sights set on becoming a Protea angler and representing South Africa on the international stage, a dream that seems well within reach for this talented teen.","html":"With an African record already to his name, Owen now has his sights set on becoming a Protea angler and representing South Africa on the international stage, a dream that seems well within reach for this talented teen."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
